games.title: NBA 26 Slam Edition
games.description: The latest and greatest basketball simulation. Next-gen courts, revamped MyCareer, and Pro Play technology. Take over the league.

games.title: Webbed
games.description: Swing through the trees as a happy little spider! Physics-based web-slinging in a charming world full of bugs and wonder.

games.title: Hollow Knight: Silksong
games.description: Play as Hornet and venture to a vast new kingdom. Master new skills, hunt new beasts and discover ancient secrets.

games.title: Elden Ring: Nightreign
games.description: A standalone multiplayer experience set in the Elden Ring universe. Band together or fight alone in this roguelite action.
